idea-plugin.name: Which Key Lazy
idea-plugin.description: A LazyVim-style which-key.nvim popup for IdeaVim users. Press your leader key to see available bindings in a multi-column grid. Navigate groups, execute actions, all without leaving the keyboard.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0
  • Initial release
  • Auto-discovers IdeaVim leader mappings via runtime API
  • Hierarchical group navigation with breadcrumb bar
  • Theme-aware colors from editor color scheme
  • Smart group icons based on description keywords
  • Customizable via g:WhichKeyDesc_ variables and ~/.whichkey-lazy.json
  • LazyVim default group names (+buffer, +code, +git, etc.)

action.text: Which Key Lazy: Show Leader Menu
action.description: Opens the which-key popup showing available key bindings
Reloads the which-key configuration from disk
